payload.note: The individual onboarding alert for Tareck Joseph has been flagged for investigation due to significant discrepancies. The screened party's date of birth (1990-05-11) and geographical association (US) contradict the matched SDN entry for Tareck El Aissami, listed as being born in 1974-11-12 from Venezuela. The deterministic decision is to investigate next due to sparse and conflicting case evidence requiring analyst verification before closure.
missing_information_summary: Additional corroboration for date of birth and geography
payload.next_step_rationale: Investigate the contradictions regarding date of birth and geography, gather additional corroboration to resolve the conflicting evidence.
